headline: CHIPOTLE TAPS AWARD-WINNING FERNANDO MACHADO AS CHIEF BRAND OFFICER
summary: Chipotle Mexican Grill (NYSE: CMG) today announced it has appointed Fernando Machado, one of the world's most innovative CMOs, as Chief Brand Officer, effective June 1. In this role, Machado will lead the company's global marketing strategy, brand positioning and customer engagement efforts as Chipotle continues to execute its Recipe for Growth strategy, driving innovation and expanding its global footprint.

headline: Domino’s same-store sales hit a speed bump — but execs aren’t worried
summary: Competitive pressures over value, dwindling consumer confidence and bad weather resulted in a same-stores sales increase of just 0.9%, far below expectations and Q4’s 3.7% growth.

headline: Is ChipotleHoney Chicken's Relaunch Reshaping the Investment Case for Chipotle Mexican Grill (CMG)?
summary: Chipotle Mexican Grill recently announced the return of ChipotleHoney Chicken, its best-performing limited-time item from 2025, which will roll out from April 28 across restaurants in the U.S., Canada, the U.K., France and Germany, alongside a limited US$0 delivery-fee promotion for qualifying app and web orders. The move highlights how Chipotle is using menu innovation tied to the “swicy” sweet-meets-spicy trend to keep its offerings culturally relevant while extending successful...
